author: Genshin Impact
text:
Character Trailer - "Sandrone: To New Beginnings" | Genshin Impact #GenshinImpact #Sandrone
Facts may exist objectively. Records, however, remain free, as does every life.
They record principles, structures, data, and hypotheses.
They also record joy, sorrow, compassion, and love.
